game_over_ship: Your ship has been wrecked by misfortune at sea.
game_over_morale: Your crew has lost all spirit and deserted you.
you_hesitate: You hesitate, and time slips by...
dialogue_denied_entry: You are turned away from the port. The deputy has made his decision.
dialogue_higher_fees: An additional fee of {fee} gold is demanded before you may proceed.
dialogue_cant_pay_fee: You cannot meet the additional fee. The official's patience is exhausted.
status_faction_note: Use [F] at port for full faction standing
slave_market_none: You have no enslaved persons aboard.
slave_market_free_one: Free one (costs {cost} gold at local rate)
slave_market_freed: {name} is freed. They walk off the ship without looking back.
slave_market_freed_all: All {count} are freed. The hold is empty.
slave_market_baraka_approves: Baraka watches this. He says nothing. But his bearing changes.
slave_market_purchased: You have purchased {count} enslaved person(s) for {cost} gold.
prisoner_take: Take as prisoners (ransom at next port)
prisoner_released_bonus: You release the captives. Your crew notes it.
homeport_locked: You have no reason to return yet. There is more to learn in these waters.
